predicted_sql: SELECT ds.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(far.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) AS total_registered_pregnant_women, AVG(far.PW_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS) AS avg_women_with_4_plus_anc_checkups FROM FACT_MATERNAL_ANC_REGISTRATION far JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT ds ON far.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = ds.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH dm ON far.MONTH_ID = dm.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR dy ON dm.YEAR_ID = dy.YEAR_ID WHERE dy.YEAR_VALUE = 2021 GROUP BY ds.TYPE_OF_AREA;
